market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: 35% Cheaper than City Avg – Cozy 4‑Guest Home
Quiet Retreat for 4, Steps from Downtown
Modern Cozy Home – Free Parking & Garden
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your cosy retreat in the heart of the city – an entire home perfectly suited for up to four guests. Priced at just £113.8 per night, this space is a full £61 (35%) cheaper than the local market median of £175, offering unbeatable value without compromising comfort. The bright living area invites you to unwind after a day of exploring, while the fully equipped kitchen lets you prepare home‑cooked meals. Two comfortable bedrooms provide plush bedding and ample storage, and the modern bathroom features a walk‑in shower. Guests rave about the experience, reflected in a 4.93 rating from 57 reviews, underscoring the high level of satisfaction.

Located just minutes from the city’s top attractions, shops, and public transport, the retreat is ideal for families, couples, or small groups seeking a relaxed base. Although the nightly rate is highly competitive, the next‑90‑day calendar shows only 15.2% occupancy (76 open nights), well below the city’s median 28.3%. By highlighting the price advantage and adding a few high‑impact amenities—such as dedicated parking, a private garden space, and entertainment options—you can turn this hidden gem into a top‑booked choice. Book now and enjoy a stylish, affordable stay that feels like a home away from home.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright exterior shot that shows the garden/parking area as the cover photo; it instantly communicates the outdoor and parking amenities that are currently missing from the listing.
key_diagnosis: Occupancy is only 15.2% for the next 90 days versus the city median of 28.3% – add high‑value amenities (outdoor, parking, entertainment) to boost appeal.
No photos are listed – upload professional images of every room and the exterior to meet guest expectations and improve conversion.
Title and description are minimal; rewrite them to spotlight the 35% price advantage (£113.8 vs £175 median) and the new amenities to attract more bookings.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your home is priced 35% below the city median (£113.8 vs £175) yet only 15% of nights are booked in the next 90 days.
